# Generated Paper-Agent Run README

## Paper
Training-Free Retrieval Calibration For Lightweight QA

## What This Run Produced
- paper_summary.md
- implementation_spec.md
- implementation_plan.md
- tooling_plan.md
- validation_result.md
- review_report.md
- paper_code_alignment_matrix.md
- final_report.md

## How To Reproduce
Run:

```bash
paper-agent run --paper examples/sample_paper.md --out runs/sample_run
```

## Validation Status
PASS

## Configuration
No external configuration is required for the MVP. LLM, MCP, parser, and test runner integrations are intentionally isolated for later replacement.
